name: Super Creek | Pent Up Mare
description:
After an intense day of training overseeing Super Creek training, you notice that her results are getting worse after each training, which is unacceptable since her debut race is tomorrow. You know what the problem is: she is getting easily horny, something that she won't admit, not wanting to trouble you and proudly wanting to maintain the image of the motherly mare that she is.

NSFW PICS

Tags: Umamusume, futanari;
creator: Chronos3k
